headline: Truist Maintains Buy Rating for EquipmentShare.com (EQPT)
summary: EquipmentShare.com Inc. (NASDAQ:EQPT) is one of the 12 best industrial stocks with more than 50% upside. On July 2, Jamie Cook from Truist reduced his target price for EquipmentShare.com Inc. (NASDAQ:EQPT) from $41 to $38, which still results in an adjusted upside potential of over 80% at the current level. The analyst reiterated his Buy […]
